metaData.Key Information:
Cloversoft 99.99% Antibacterial Hand Wash 500ml is here to provide an effective solution to kill off 99.99% of bacteria and germs.

They always say what you can’t see strikes the most fear in us. As such, Cloversoft is swooping in to provide a solution for eliminating those invisible germs!

Presenting the long-awaited Cloversoft 99.99% Antibacterial Hand Wash 500ml which allows you to turn your living space into a safe and germ-free space for you, your kids and your loved ones. Not only that, our premium yet affordable 99.99% antibacterial hand wash has a natural white tea scent that exudes an immediate pleasant and comforting smell that is bound to soothe your concerns!

product.name: Cloversoft Anti-Bacterial Hand Wash - White Tea

parentCategory.tagLine: Bath & body, hair care, facial wash & more

metaData.Key Information:
• Provides effective protection against germs with anti-bacterial and anti-septic ingredients, yet is gentle on skin with 100% cleansing ingredients from plants
• Dispenses creamy foam that helps to clean all parts of hands easily and more thoroughly than ordinary liquid hand soap
• Keeps skin moisturized with peach extracts that is naturally rich in Vitamins and leaves a mild fruity Peach fragrance after wash

product.description:
Benefits of Cloversoft plant-based hand wash:
• Safe for kids
• Make sure your hands are sufficiently moisturized
• Natural White Tea extract

metaData.Key Information:
Plant-Based & Organic Hand Wash!
Cloversoft's plant-based antibacterial hand wash provides an effective solution to kill off 99.99% of bacteria and germs. With our low suds formulation, Cloversoft’s hand wash it's safe for kids and perfect for frequent handwashing to keep you protected while making sure your hands are sufficiently moisturized with each hand wash.
Made with natural white tea extract, our hand wash exudes an immediate pleasant and comforting fragrance that is long-lasting as well.
metaData.SAP Product Name: CLOVERSOFT ANTI-BACTERIAL HAND WASH REFILL WHITE TEA 500ML
